items.title: Trump says he won't sign housing bill, which would become law automatically
items.description: Congress passed the bill that aims to address the costs of homes and rein in institutional investors with strong bipartisan support in June.

items.title: Inside Wealth: Private chef salaries reach $300,000 as the rich seek their own Michelin stars
items.description: Demand for chefs, personal assistants, butlers, nannies, housekeepers, chauffeurs and estate managers have reached records, according to Morgan & Mallet.

items.title: Ukraine escalates attacks on tankers near Crimea as Russian fuel shortages bite
items.description: The drone strikes form part of Ukraine's campaign designed to choke off supplies and transportation routes in and out of Crimea.

items.title: New Fed task force members share Chairman Kevin Warsh's embrace of AI
items.description: The three members of a task force advising the Fed on artificial intelligence are strong proponents of the technology.

items.title: Stablecoin issuer Circle just got the greenlight to operate as a bank. The shares are up 12%
items.description: Stablecoin issuer Circle surged in premarket trading after the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency granted it approval to operate as a trust bank.

items.title: Why the stock market and economy may seem out of sync
items.description: The stock market has boomed on AI euphoria, while the trajectory of the U.S. economy has been more tepid, economists said.

items.title: Delta expects higher airfare to last, bringing 2026 profit goal in reach, CEO says
items.description: Delta is the first of the U.S. airlines to report second-quarter results.

items.title: Meta found to breach EU laws with 'addictive' Instagram, Facebook designs
items.description: Instagram and Facebook's "addictive" designs have put Meta in breach of the European Union's digital laws, the EU concluded Friday in a preliminary report.

items.title: The Tech Download: Teen social media bans miss a key part of the puzzle: AI chatbots
items.description: Teenagers are increasingly becoming dependent on AI chatbots, echoing a familiar problem with social media in the 2010s.

items.title: Volkswagen to slash model lineup and shrink capacity — but no word on job cuts
items.description: The update followed a high-stakes boardroom showdown with the group's supervisory board.

items.title: OpenAI exec Fidji Simo says she's stepping down due to chronic illness, will transition to advisor
items.description: Fidji Simo stepped away from OpenAI in April for a medical leave, says she now has to focus on recovery.

items.title: AI, data center fears could be key in closely watched Michigan Democratic Senate primary
items.description: Abdul El-Sayed and Rep. Haley Stevens will face off in the Michigan Democratic Senate primary on Aug. 4.

items.title: Abivax $920 million cash haul lets it prepare for solo U.S. launch instead of relying on a buyer, CEO tells CNBC
items.description: Its latest fundraising round provides the French biotech with enough cash to finance operations through 2029.

items.title: World oil demand set for first annual decline since 2020, IEA says
items.description: Renewed escalation in the U.S.-Iran war could complicate matters and further cloud the outlook, the IEA warned Friday.

items.title: EasyJet pops 13% as airline weighs $7.7 billion rival takeover bid from Apollo
items.description: A bidding war has broken out for budget carrier easyJet after Apollo and Castlelake have both submitted takeover offers.

items.title: India ramps up missile sales in Indo-Pacific as China’s assertiveness turns neighbors wary
items.description: India has signed a third pact for the supply of missiles in the Indo-Pacific region as countries in the region grow wary of China's growing assertion.

items.title: U.S. to continue 'technical talks' with Iran after Trump said ceasefire was 'over'
items.description: The ceasefire signed last month came under serious strain in recent days as the U.S. and Iranian forces exchanged attacks for consecutive days this week.

items.title: Inside NATO's extraordinary 48 hours that revealed Trump's grip on global diplomacy
items.description: Steve Sedgwick goes behind the scenes of NATO's dramatic 48 hours, where Trump's changing tone reshaped diplomacy and left allies guessing.

items.title: Florida's Palm Beach airport renamed for Trump
items.description: Palm Beach International Airport is now called President Donald J. Trump International Airport, the FAA said Thursday.

items.title: Anduril CEO says it's bad to IPO in ‘middle of a hype cycle’
items.description: Anduril recently hit a $61 billion valuation, becoming one of the most highly valued private tech companies.
